events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes pipe bedding & backfill work at rough-complete stage. The observed condition is rocks against pipe with no bedding sand. This is non-compliant - pipe bedding requires proper granular bedding material (sand/gravel) to protect the pipe from point loads caused by rocks. IPC 306 covers excavation, bedding, and backfill requirements. Rocks directly against pipe can damage the pipe and is a defect.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (potential pipe damage/failure)
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: ~85 (rough-complete)
Confidence: high
